sections.paragraph:
Original: חטּיל

Transliteration: chaṭṭı̂yl

Phonetic: khat-teel'

BDB Definition:

Hattil = "doubtful"
  1. head of a family of the children of Solomon's slaves who returned from exile with Zerubbabel

Origin: from an unused root apparently meaning to wave

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
